mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM rn, A.* FROM (
SELECT p.product_id, p.product_name, p.product_type, p.target_customer, p.product_desc, p.rate_category, p.is_active, NVL(MAX(r.base_rate), 0) AS max_rate FROM product p LEFT JOIN rate r ON p.product_id = r.product_id
WHERE 1=1
AND ( p.target_customer = #{targetCustomer} OR p.target_customer = 'all' )
AND p.product_type = #{productType}
AND ( p.product_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR p.product_desc LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
AND p.is_active = 'T'
GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name, p.product_type, p.target_customer, p.product_desc, p.rate_category, p.is_active
ORDER BY max_rate DESC
ORDER BY p.product_name ASC
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE rn >= #{startRow}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT p.product_id, p.product_name, p.product_type, p.product_desc, NVL(MAX(r.base_rate), 0) AS max_rate FROM product p LEFT JOIN rate r ON p.product_id = r.product_id
WHERE p.is_active = 'T'
AND ( p.target_customer = #{targetCustomer} OR p.target_customer = 'all' )
GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name, p.product_type, p.product_desc
ORDER BY max_rate DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3

SELECT product_id, product_name, product_type, target_customer, product_desc, min_amount, max_amount, min_period_month, max_period_month, join_method, precautions, mkt_msg_top, mkt_msg_bottom, is_active, rate_category FROM product WHERE product_id = #{productId}
SELECT currency_code, currency_name, is_available FROM product_currency WHERE product_id = #{productId}

SELECT rate_id, currency_code, customer_type, residency_type, period_month, base_rate, maturity_rate, early_cancel_rate, rate_type, perferential_rate FROM rate WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY period_month ASC
SELECT p.pref_rate_id, p.condition_type, p.condition_desc, p.pref_rate FROM pref_rate_condition p JOIN rate r ON p.rate_id = r.rate_id WHERE r.product_id = #{productId}
